title: 第 56 節
en: The directions in the preceding chapter are general, and do not depend on the reladonship of the faithful with the deceased person ; whereas those in this Fargard are of a special character, and apply only to the near relatives of the dead. Their object is to determine how long the time of 'staying' (upam an) should last for different relatives. What is meant by this word is not explained ; but, as the word upaman is usually employed to indicate the staying of the unclean in the Armtxt-g&h, apart from the faithful and from every clean object, that word upaman seems to show a certain period of mourning, marked by abstention from usual avocations.

The length of the upaman varies with the degrees ofrelation^ip ;. and at every degree it is double for relations who have died in a state of sin (that is, with a sin not redeemed by the Patet : cf. p. 135, note i). The relative length of the upaman is as follows : —
For the head of a family (§ 7) : 6 months (or a year).
I For father or mother (§ i) \ First degree. \ For son or daughter (J 3) ? 30 days (or 60).
' For brother or sister (5 r) '
See Farg. VIII, 19, 20.
FARCARD XII. 1 49 /For grandfather or grand- - , \ mother (§9) i . / v Second degree, p^^ grandson or grand- ^S days (or 50).
\ daughter (§11) '
Third degree. For uncle or aunt (§ 13) : 20 days (or 40).
_ . , I For male cousin or female ) , , .
Fourthdegree. | ^^^.^ ^j ^^^ J 15 days (or 30).
r«vrL J f For the son or daughter of a 1 Fifth degree. { cousin (§17) J 10 days (or 20), «... ( For the grandson or the grand- ) , , Sixth degree. | ^^^^j^^^^ ^^^ ^^^^.^ ^j ^^^ f 6 days (or lo).
I. If one's father or mother dies, how long shall they stay [in mourning], the son for his father, the daughter for her mother? How long for the righteous.^ How long for the sinners^?
Ahura Mazda answered : ' They shall stay thirty days for the righteous, sixty days for the sinners.'
2 (5). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One ! How shall I cleanse the house ? How shall it be clean again ?

Ahura Maeda answered : ' You shall wash your bodies three times, you shall wash your clothes three times, you shall chant the Githas three times; you shall offer up a sacrifice to my Fire, you shall bind the bundles of Baresma, you shall bring libations to the good waters * ; then the house shall be clean, and then the waters may enter, then the fire may enter, and then the Amesha-Spei^tas may enter *, O Spitama Zarathu^tra ! '
^ How long if the dead person died in a state of holiness (a dahma) ? How long if in the slate of a Peshdtanu ?
' This refers probably to the sacrifice that is offered on each of the three days that follow the death of a Zoroastrian for the salvation of his soul.
' All the other objects over ^ich the Amesha-Spe»tas preside (such as the cow, the metals, ftc.)
1 50 VENDtoAD.
3 (9). If ones son or daughter dies, how long shall they stay, the father for his son, the mother for her daughter? How long for the righteous? How long for the sinners?

Ahura Mazda answered : * They shall stay thirty days for the righteous, sixty days for the sinners/ 4 (13). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One! How shall I cleanse the house ? How shall it be clean again ?

Ahura Mazda answered : * You shall wash your bodies three times, you shall wash your clothes three times, you shall chant the G&thas three times ; you shall offer up a sacrifice to my Fire, you shall bind up the bundles of Baresma, you shall bring libations to the good waters; then the house shall be clean, and then the waters may enter, then the fire may enter, and then the AmeshaSpe»tas may enter, O Spitama Zarathortra ! * 5 (17). If ones brother or sister dies, how long shall they stay, the brother for his brother, the sister for her sister ? How long for the righteous ? How long for the sinners ?
Ahura Mazda answered : * They shall stay thirty days for the righteous, sixty days for the sinners.'
6 (21). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One! How shall I cleanse the house? How shall it be clean again ?

Ahura Mazda answered : ' You shall wash your bodies three times, you shall wash your clothes three times, you shall chant the G&thas three times ; you shall offer up a sacrifice to my Fire, you shall bind up the bundles of Baresma, you shall bring libations to the good waters; then the house shall be clean, and then the waters may enter, then the fire may enter, and then the AmeshaSpe/itas may enter, O Spitama Zarathu^ra I '
7 (25). If the master of the house ^ dies, or if the ^ The chief of the family, the paterfamilias. The Zoroastrian family is organised on the patriarchal system.
PARGARD XII. 151 mistress of the house dies, how long shall they stay? How long for the righteous? How long for the sinners ?

Ahura Mazda answered : * They ^ shall stay six months for the righteous, a year for the sinners/ 8 (28). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One I How shall I cleanse the house? How shall it be clean again ?

Ahura Mazda answered : * You shall wash your bodies three times, you shall wash your dotlies three times, you shall chant the G&thas three times ; you shall ofTer up a sacrifice to my Fire, you shall bind up the bundles of Baresma, you shall bring libations to the good waters; then the house shall be clean, and then the waters may enter, then the fire may enter, and then the AmeshaSpe^itas may enter, O Spitama Zarathmtra I '
zh: 前一章中的指示是籠統的，不涉及信徒與亡者的關係；而本法爾加德（Fargard）中的指示則具有特殊性質，僅適用於亡者的近親。其目的在於規定不同親屬的「逗留」時期（upaman）應持續多久。這個詞的含義並未明確解釋；但由於 upaman 一詞通常用於表示不潔淨者在阿瑞瑪蒂-格赫（Armtxt-g&h）中的逗留——遠離信徒及一切潔淨的物品——該詞 upaman 似乎指明了一個確定的哀悼期，其特徵是禁絕日常的職業活動。
烏帕曼（upaman）的長度隨著親屬關係的程度而變化，且在每個程度上，對於在罪惡狀態下亡故的親屬（即以帕泰特（Patet）未能救贖的罪過而亡故者；參見第一三五頁註一），其長度為雙倍。烏帕曼的相對長度如下：——
對於一家之主（§ 7）：6 個月（或一年）。
我為父親或母親（§ i）首級。為兒子或女兒（ 3）？30 天（或 60 天）。
「為兄弟或姐妹」(5 r)
見《法爾迦德經》第八篇，第19、20節。

第三級。舅父或舅母（§ 13）：二十天（或四十天）。

I. 若一人之父或母去世，其子為父親守喪、其女為母親守喪應歷時多久？義人^守喪應歷時多久。罪人^守喪應歷時多久？
阿胡拉‧瑪茲達回答道：「他們對義人停留三十天，對罪人停留六十天。」
2 (5). 物質世界的創造者啊，至聖者！我將如何淨化此屋？它將如何再次潔淨？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答道：「你應當三次沐浴你的身體，三次洗淨你的衣服，三次吟誦《蓋瑟經》；你應當向我的聖火獻祭，你應當綁束巴雷斯瑪的束束，你應當向善水奉獻奠酒*；如是則房舍得淨，如是則水可以進入，如是則火可以進入，如是則阿梅沙－斯彼塔斯可以進入*，哦，斯皮塔馬‧瑪茲達亞斯特拉！」
如果死者在聖潔狀態（a dahma）中去世，那麼多久呢？如果在佩什丹尼狀態中去世，那麼又是多久呢？
這大概是指在瑣羅亞斯德教信徒死後隨之而來的三天內，每一天都獻上的祭祀，目的是為了拯救其靈魂。
阿美沙-斯彭塔（Amesha-Spentas）所主宰的所有其他對象（例如牛、金屬等）
我已準備好翻譯，但發現您提供的英文原文似乎不完整： ``` 1 50 VENDtoAD. ``` 這段文字無法形成有意義的英文句子或段落。請提供完整的英文原文，我將遵循您列出的所有規則進行翻譯。
3 (9). 若有人之子或女死亡，彼等應停留多久，父親為其子，母親為其女？義人停留多久？罪人停留多久？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答說：「對於義人，他們應停留三十日；對於罪人，六十日。」4 (13)。至高造物者啊，物質世界的創造者！我應當如何淨化此屋？它如何才能再度清淨？

阿胡拉‧馬茲達答道：「你應當洗淨你的身體三次，你應當洗淨你的衣服三次，你應當詠唱蓋瑟三次；你應當向我的火獻祭，你應當束紮巴雷斯瑪的束把，你應當向良善的水奉獻灌祭；如此這般，房舍才得以潔淨，如此這般，水才得以進入，如此這般，火才得以進入，如此這般，亞美沙斯彭塔才得以進入，哦史比塔瑪‧瑣羅亞斯德！」5 (17)。如若一個人的兄長或姐妹亡故，他們應當停留多久，兄長為其兄長，姐妹為其姐妹？義人應當停留多久？罪人應當停留多久？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答：「他們將停留三十天以待正義者，六十天以待罪人。」
6 (21). 物質世界的造物者啊，聖潔者！我應當如何淨化此屋？它將如何再次潔淨？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答：「你應洗淨你的身體三次，你應洗淨你的衣物三次，你應吟誦《迦塔》（Gâthas）三次；你應向我的火獻祭，你應捆紮巴瑞斯瑪束（Baresma），你應向善水獻上奠祭；如此房屋方得潔淨，如此水方得進入，如此火方得進入，如此不死光明聖者（AmeshaSpe∆itas）方得進入，喔，史匹達瑪‧查拉圖斯特拉（Spitama Zarathu^ra）！」
7 (25). 若家父^亡故，或若^家族之首，即一家之長（paterfamilias）。瑣羅亞斯德教之家族乃以族長制組織之。
第十二部分 151 如果家的女主人去世，他們應當停留多久？對於義人應當多久？對於罪人應當多久？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答：「對於義人，他們應停留六個月；對於罪人，應停留一年。」（28）。喔，物質世界的造物者，至聖者啊！我應如何淨化此宅？它將如何再次潔淨？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達答道：「你應當洗淨你的身體三次，你應當洗淨你的衣物三次，你應當吟誦蓋薩三次；你應當向我的火獻祭，你應當束紮好巴雷斯瑪的捆束，你應當對善水獻奠；如此則居所淨潔，則水得入，則火得入，則阿美沙‧斯彭塔得入，啊，斯皮塔瑪‧琿羅亞斯特拉！」
